description: Lines 45-109 of refresh_loop.cr contain ~65 lines of semaphore/channel/atomic counter management that is a distinct concurrency primitive concern. Extract into src/fetcher/refresh_semaphore.cr as a standalone module. This includes: CONCURRENCY_LIMIT, lazy initialization of semaphore channel/counter/repair_mutex, acquire/release methods, health check, and reset. RefreshLoop would then call RefreshSemaphore.acquire/release instead of its own private methods.
title: Extract semaphore management into RefreshSemaphore module
